violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Observed employee with long hair not proper restraint.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Observed wet towels not stored in sanitizing solution.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Observed scooper in powder mix that the handle was touching the powder mixture.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food inside microwave.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
